====={{aniseries|JN}}=====
In ''[[JN018|Destination: Coronation!]]'', it was revealed that Surge left the Gym in the care of [[Visquez]] and left on his own journey to become a better Electric-type Trainer. It was also revealed that he trained the Raichu that Visquez owns, and Ash's fame had grown amongst the Trainers at the Gym.
